reviews.comment:
Es una estacion de servicio bastante lenta, sobretodo los domingos que son dias de promocion. Los chicos que trabajan ahi son muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
It's a pretty slow gas station, especially on Sundays, which are promotional days. The guys who work there are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMVBPbC1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. No suele haber muchos autos. Tiene para inflar las ruedas gratis. Solo le falta una YPF Full

(Translated by Google)
Good service. There aren't usually many cars. They have free tire inflation. They just need a full YPF gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReFBtY193RRAB
